name: stackra/newsletter
purpose: Editorial newsletter engine — Newsletter, NewsletterIssue, NewsletterSubscription, NewsletterCampaign, NewsletterAudience aggregates with CAN-SPAM + CASL compliance.
capabilities: NewsletterCampaign — one send event per issue
CAN-SPAM + CASL enforcement + RFC 8058 one-click unsubscribe
when_to_use: A tenant publishes curated editorial content to a consenting subscriber list on a cadence with legal compliance.
when_not_to_use: For per-user transactional notifications, use stackra/notifications-mail directly. For broadcast admin messages, use stackra/announcements.
